{{Infobox location
| name = Silverreach
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

''See also: [[Silverreach Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Silverreach is a coastal town characterized by simple wooden houses with plaster and sloping tiled roofs, situated on cobbled streets that ascend a hill. The settlement is overlooked by a lighthouse located on the cliffs, which has historically served as a maritime supervisor, though its utility declined once the [[Navigator]]'s [[Guild]] began operating without the need for such lights. The town is built upon an ancient [[library]], which serves as the site where [[the Emperor]] previously sealed the [[Great Elder]] Ach’magut. Historically, Silverreach celebrated its founding with festivities involving bonfires and food stalls, though it was also noted to be the center of a mysterious isolating barrier. The town's status has fluctuated in various accounts: it was once described as empty, later appearing well-maintained with a clean harbor and freshly painted lighthouse, but it was also predicted to be dead. Ultimately, visions depict the town being destroyed by an explosion, leaving behind a burning crater.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Silverreach is an abandoned village built upon the tomb of Ach’magut that serves as a destination for the traveling ship. Though it is known as a place where people are welcomed, the town is haunted by [[Elders]] and characterized by its hive-like layout of empty buildings. The settlement features streets made of rough cobblestones, which served as the site for an escape through night-shrouded paths. During this time, the [[Sleepless]] dragged [[Jerri]]'s crew through these very streets. Located three hours from where [[Foster]] found [[Calder]], the town remains a desolate location.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is a town that the ship is traveling toward.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] was built on Ach’magut’s tomb.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is an abandoned, [[Elder]]-haunted village.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is a place where people are welcomed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is a location where the [[Sleepless]] dragged [[Jerri]]'s crew through the streets.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is a location where an escape occurred through night-shrouded streets.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is a town located three hours from where [[Foster]] found [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] is a location with streets made of rough cobblestones.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Silverreach]] contains streets of 'empty' buildings and resembles a hive.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Located on the continent of [[Izyria]], Silverreach is a harbor town characterized by its sloped, tiled roofs and an abandoned lighthouse situated on a hill. Built over an ancient [[library]], the town was eventually isolated by a mysterious barrier, leading to a total loss of contact. During historical events, [[Shera]] maneuvered herself above the location to strike, and it was within this town that [[Ach'magut]] began to stir. Ultimately, the settlement was destroyed by fire.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Contact has been lost with the city of [[Silverreach]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] was built over an ancient [[library]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a town with an abandoned lighthouse on a hill overlooking it.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a town located on the continent of [[Izyria]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is isolated by a mysterious barrier.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a town.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a location mentioned in the past.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a location above which [[Shera]] maneuvered herself to strike.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a town where [[Ach'magut]] began to stir.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a harbor town with sloped, tiled roofs.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] contains a lighthouse.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Silverreach]] is a town that was destroyed by fire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“We’re probably three hours from the town where you found me. Silverreach.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An image formed in Calder’s mind, of Silverreach above with its streets of “empty” buildings.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
